text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: The day after a regional event...

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text:
Nature, have you decided on your plans after we
check out? There's still some time before we
board the bullet train.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Uh, I haven't really given it much thought.
Shopping for souvenirs, I guess. What about you?

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text:
I think I'll tour a few sightseeing locations. You're
welcome to join me if you'd like.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Oh, so I get to go on one of your famous "Ikuno
tours" I've heard about! I'd be more than happy to
join you.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Helios talked about how thorough you are
researching areas and serving as a guide during
trips.

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text:
That's something people talk about? Well, I hope
I can meet your expectations...

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text:
My first idea was to learn about this region's
writing and history with a tour through its museum
of literature and its castle. For lunch, my
recommendation is to eat the local specialty,
beef udon noodles.

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text:
Next, we could walk through the many shopping
districts. They're all unique in their own right, not
to mention the nearby udon and yaki udon
restaurants.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Ooh, shopping! That part has my name written all
over it. I bet this'll save me from the
embarrassment of buying a souvenir too similar to
someone else's.

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text:
If that's your concern, why don't we choose a
place with a variety of shops?

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
But let's take care of our stomachs first. First stop
is udon, followed by some yaki udon to top it off.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
What? Weren't you interested in the food? We
should have a taste of the local dishes.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
I'm sure these restaurants aren't as strict with their
rules. We could split one or ask for half the
normal serving.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Of course, I'll do all the negotiations.

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text:
Hehe... I'll take you up on your word. Now then,
let's tour some udon shops!
